canonical_definition: The property of a watermarking method where the expected probability distribution of tokens in the watermarked text remains identical to the original, unwatermarked distribution.

definitions.text: The property of a watermarking method where the expected probability distribution of tokens in the watermarked text remains identical to the original, unwatermarked distribution.

characterization: The property of a watermarking method where the expected probability distribution of tokens in the watermarked text remains identical to the original, unwatermarked distribution.
